modules.source: import { ref } from 'vue'; const signal = ref(0); export default signal;

import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; import payload from './producer'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); watchEffect(() => { if (!ready.value) return; if (enabled.value) { try { for (const item of [1]) { if (item) { payload.value; } } } finally { sink(); } } });
import { ref } from 'vue'; const signal = ref(0); export default signal;

import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; import payload from './producer'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); watchEffect(() => { ready.value && (enabled.value ? payload.value : sink()); });
import { shallowRef } from 'vue'; const signal = shallowRef(0); export default signal;
